name: Materials > Drywall > Drywall Sheets
basis: Material passthrough per sheet, no labor. material_allowance = retail cost of one 1/2 in 4x8 drywall sheet ~$16; market_price = same retail. Engine applies 25% markup. 5/8 in fire-rate runs a few dollars higher.
sources: Home Depot 1/2 in 4x8 drywall ~$14-16/sheet, 5/8 in ~$18-20 (2026 building materials). Brevard big-box retail.

name: Materials > Drywall > Joint Compound
basis: Material passthrough per unit (standard 4.5 gal ready-mix box), no labor. material_allowance = retail ~$18; market_price = same. Engine applies 25% markup.
sources: Home Depot all-purpose joint compound 4.5 gal box ~$16-20 (2026); quart/gal tubs less. Brevard big-box retail.

name: Materials > Lumber > 2x4 Studs
basis: Material passthrough per stud, no labor. material_allowance = retail cost of one 2x4x8 stud ~$5; market_price = same. Engine applies 25% markup.
sources: Home Depot 2x4x8 #2/premium SPF stud ~$4-6 each (2026 framing studs). Brevard big-box retail.

name: Materials > Lumber > Plywood Sheets
basis: Material passthrough per sheet, no labor. material_allowance = retail of a mid-grade 3/4 in 4x8 plywood sheet ~$40; market_price = same. Grade/thickness swings $15 (OSB) to $55+ (hardwood). Engine applies 25% markup.
sources: Home Depot plywood 2026: OSB from $15, BCX ~$28, 3/4 in utility pine ~$35-55, birch $55+. Mid-grade 4x8 sanded/BCX sheet ~$40.

name: Materials > Paint > Exterior Paint
basis: Material passthrough per gallon, no labor. material_allowance = retail of one gallon mid-grade exterior paint ~$55; market_price = same. Engine applies 25% markup. Premium lines (Duration/Emerald) run higher.
sources: SW exterior commonly $50-$90/gal, premium $100+ (usecalcpro 2026); Behr exterior $28-$55/gal. Mid-grade contractor exterior gal ~$50-60.

name: Materials > Paint > Interior Paint
basis: Material passthrough per gallon, no labor. material_allowance = retail of one gallon mid-grade interior paint ~$45; market_price = same. Engine applies 25% markup. Premium lines run higher.
sources: SW interior $45-$110/gal list, ~$30-75 on sale; SuperPaint ~$62, ProMate ~$45; Behr $10-20 cheaper (paintstrategies 2026). Mid-grade interior gal ~$40-50.
